message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassDiagram
    class C {
        title Message
        <<interface>>
        topic : string
        hdr : Header
        data : Frame
        version()
        len()
        data()
        topic()
    }

    class C {
        title Frame
        data
        len
        Frame(len)
        Frame(len, data)
        ~Frame()
        len()
        get()
        set(data, len)
    }

    class C {
        title Header
        version : uint32_t
        len : uint32_t
    }

    Message o--* Frame
    Message o--* Header

@enduml
